backend/main.mo: Motoko actor that defines a Match type and exposes a `getMatches` query returning a hardcoded list of 4 Free Fire matches; also includes blob-storage mixin.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report linking the RegistrationPage feature (two input fields, sessionStorage match context, neon-red theme) to its implementation file and test ID REQ-17.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-line summaries of every frontend source file, serving as a reference index for the project's component and page structure.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base CSS file defining OKLCH-based design tokens for light and dark themes including background, card, border, and chart color variables.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point titled 'Elite Gaming Hub' that mounts the React app into a `#root` div via `src/main.tsx`.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React app that configures TanStack Router with a shared RootLayout (Header + Outlet) and two routes: '/' for the Home page and '/registration' for RegistrationPage.
frontend/src/components/ConfirmationModa: Success dialog modal displayed after payment submission, showing a check icon, match details (game mode, entry fee, prize pool), and player registration info (In-Game Name and Player ID).
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Fixed top navigation header displaying the 'Elite Gaming Hub' logo with neon-red Orbitron styling and a circular profile avatar button with neon glow border.
frontend/src/components/MatchCard.tsx: Match card component that displays game mode, entry fee, prize pool, and status; on 'Join Now' click it saves match context to sessionStorage and navigates to '/registration'.
frontend/src/components/MatchList.tsx: Displays a grid of match cards fetched via `useMatches`, falling back to static match data on error or empty results, with a refresh button and loading skeleton.
frontend/src/components/MatchListSkeleto: Renders a 4-card skeleton loading placeholder grid that mirrors the layout of real match cards using shimmer skeleton elements.
frontend/src/components/PaymentModal.tsx: A dialog modal that displays UPI payment details for a match entry fee, allows copying the UPI ID, and lets users upload a payment screenshot before submitting.
frontend/src/components/RegistrationModa: A dialog modal form that collects a player's in-game name and player ID for match registration, with basic validation before submission.
frontend/src/components/TournamentBanner: An auto-advancing image carousel banner showcasing three tournament slides with title, prize pool, and navigation controls, cycling every 5 seconds.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) based on the current Internet Identity, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an `InternetIdentityProvider` and `useInternetIdentity` hook that manage ICP AuthClient lifecycle, login/logout, and expose identity state and status to the component tree.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports `useMatches`, a React Query hook that fetches the list of matches from the ICP backend actor with 30-second stale time and 60-second refetch interval.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Rajdhani and Orbitron fonts, defining CSS custom properties for a dark neon-red theme, and providing utility classes for neon glow effects, shimmer, and animations.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that wraps the App component with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider, then mounts it to the DOM.
frontend/src/pages/RegistrationPage.tsx: Registration page component that reads match context from sessionStorage and renders a form with In-Game Name and Player ID fields, plus a Proceed to Payment button with basic validation.
frontend/src/types/registration.ts: TypeScript type definitions for the registration flow, including RegistrationData, PaymentData, and RegistrationFlowState interfaces.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with Orbitron/Rajdhani fonts, neon-red color palette, custom box shadows, and dark-mode class strategy, with typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state snapshot (version 15) describing the Elite Gaming Hub app's architecture, existing features, dark neon-red theme, and page-based registration flow.
